zh.Kendal, Westmorland, England: 英國維斯特莫藍德肯達爾

zh.Mercaston, Derbyshire, England: 英國英格蘭德比夏爾梅爾卡斯頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Ales Alice Bozon於1412年出生在英國英格蘭德比夏爾梅爾卡斯頓時，她的父親Sir Richard Rychard Bozon28歲，母親Mrs. Richard Bozun23歲。她於大約1476年與Roger Horndesford在英國奧可福爾斯坦頓 哈爾庫特結婚。她去世於1455年在英國諾圖波藍德布萊斯享年43歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ales Alice Bozon于1412年出生在英国英格兰德比夏爾梅爾卡斯頓时，她的父亲Sir Richard Rychard Bozon28岁，母亲Mrs. Richard Bozun23岁。她于大约1476年与Roger Horndesford在英国奧可福爾斯坦頓 哈爾庫特结婚。她去世于1455年在英国諾圖波藍德布萊斯享年43岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bozon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Bohan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Connor, John Patrick, Brendan, Liam.
Irish (Leitrim): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Buadhacháin, from a personal name which is a diminutive of buadhach ‘victorious’.

nameMeanings.name: Ales
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Alice
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Ales Alice Bozon was born in 1412, in Mercaston, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Richard Rychard Bozon, was 28 and her mother, Mrs. Richard Bozun, was 23. She married Roger Horndesford about 1476, in Stanton Harcourt, Oxfordshire, England. She died in 1455, in Blyth, Northumberland, England, at the age of 43.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ales Alice Bozon est née en 1412, à Mercaston, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Richard Rychard Bozon, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Richard Bozun, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Roger Horndesford environ 1476, à Stanton Harcourt, Oxfordshire, Angleterre. Elle est décédée en 1455, à Blyth, Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 43 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ales Alice Bozon 1412 in Mercaston, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Richard Rychard Bozon 28 und ihre Mutter Mrs. Richard Bozun 23. Sie hat um 1476 in Stanton Harcourt, Oxfordshire, England Roger Horndesford geheiratet. Sie starb 1455 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Blyth, Northumberland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ales Alice Bozon è nata il nel 1412 nel Mercaston, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Richard Rychard Bozon, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Mrs. Richard Bozun, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Roger Horndesford circa 1476, nel Stanton Harcourt, Oxfordshire, England. Morì nel 1455, nel Blyth, Northumberland, England, all'età di 43 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ales Alice Bozonが1412年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアメルカストンで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Rychard Bozonは28歳，母Mrs. Richard Bozunは23歳であった。約1476年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアスタントン ハーコウルトでRoger Horndesfordと結婚した。彼女は1455年にイギリスノースウンバーランドブリスで43歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ales Alice Bozon(이)가 1412년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 머카스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Richard Rychard Bozon(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Richard Bozun(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 대략 1476년 영국 스퍼드실르 스탠턴 하르쿠르트에서 Roger Horndesford(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1455년 영국 노르스벌랜드 블리스에서 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Mercaston, Derbyshire, England: Mercaston, Deorbyscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ales Alice Bozon nasceu em 1412, em Mercaston, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Richard Rychard Bozon, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Richard Bozun, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Roger Horndesford aproximadamente 1476, em Stanton Harcourt, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Ela faleceu em 1455, em Blyth, Northumberland, Inglaterra, com 43 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ales Alice Bozon родилась в 1412 г. в местности миркастон, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Richard Rychard Bozon было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Richard Bozun, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger Horndesford около 1476 г. в местности стантон харкоурт, оксфордшир, Англия. Она умерла в 1455 г. в местности блит, нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 43 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ales Alice Bozon nació en 1412, en Mercaston, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Richard Rychard Bozon, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Mrs. Richard Bozun, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Roger Horndesford aproximadamente 1476, en Stanton Harcourt, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Murió en 1455, en Blyth, Northumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 43 años.
